name: Re: Crockpot Recipes 6
recipeInstructions:
1. Using a fork, mix all the ingredients together, except for the catsup and pepper rings.
2. Shape the mixture into a loaf and place it in a greased crockpot.
3. Top with catsup and pepper rings.
4. Cover and cook on high for 1 hour.
5. Reduce heat to low and continue cooking for 6 to 8 hours.
6. Optionally, quartered potatoes coated with butter can also be cooked with this recipe. A dash of Paprika will give them a nice browned look (same cooking time).
